Architecture

Academic · Technical Drawing · Studio 5 & 6 · 2020–2021

Working Drawing

A complete set of technical working drawings for a 3BHK residential project, produced across Studio 5 and 6. The exercise covers the full range of architectural documentation — from floor plans and marking drawings to structural details, MEP layouts, sections, elevations, kitchen and bathroom details, and door schedules. Drawings were produced for a 2nd-semester residential design to develop technical documentation skills.

Technical DrawingResidentialStructural MEPAutoCADRevit
LocationBangalore
Year2020–2021
TypeResidential · 3BHK
StudioStudio 5 & 6 · Nitte SAPD
SoftwareAutoCAD · Revit

Overview — floor plans, marking drawings, details, sections & elevations, plumbing & electrical, kitchen & bathroom

Floor Plans & Marking Drawing

Site Plan to Structural Layout

The set includes the site plan showing the 700 sqm proposed site area with lake setback, followed by ground, first and second floor plans. The marking drawing translates the architectural layout into a structural grid for construction — showing RCC column positions, dimensions and grid references across all three floors. RCC column details and staircase details (riser 150–180mm, tread 300mm, nosing 20mm) are included.

Site plan · Ground, first and second floor plans · Marking drawings for all floors · RCC column details · Staircase details

Services

Plumbing & Electrical Layouts

The plumbing layout shows supply and drainage across ground, first, second floors and the roof plan. The electrical layout covers all three floors with a full legend of symbols — bell push, fan regulators, two-way switches, charger points, switched socket outlets (5A and 15A), AC indoor units, mirror light fixtures, exhaust fan points, and bracket lights.

Plumbing layout — ground, first, second, roof plan · Electrical layout — ground, first and second floors with full legend

Sections, Elevations & Details

Kitchen, Bathroom & Door Details

Four external elevations (West, East, South, North) show the complete facade including roof top garden, box projections, textured closure points and cladding. Sections AA' and BB' cut through the full height of the building. Bathroom details include waterproofing specification (20mm WP plastering, 20mm DAD0, 110mm RCC wall) and kitchen details showing cabinet layout, tile and section. Door schedules and details at three levels of scale are included.

Elevations — West, East, South, North · Section AA' and BB' · Bathroom plan, sections and waterproofing detail · Kitchen detail plan · Door schedule and details
